query:
SELECT id, name, email, active, LEFT(notes, 60) AS note_excerpt FROM tutors ORDER BY active DESC, name;
SELECT id, date, dayType, status FROM dailyPlans WHERE date > '2026-12-31' ORDER BY date LIMIT 30;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZHgHA7566FjgCYD.51c539e8d5ba --database mm3swGictQLHDWKPJCGiHp --execute SELECT id, name, email, active, LEFT(notes, 60) AS note_excerpt FROM tutors ORDER BY active DESC, name;
SELECT id, date, dayType, status FROM dailyPlans WHERE date > '2026-12-31' ORDER BY date LIMIT 30;
